name: governance-workflows
description: Reusable agent governance system for software development projects

scripts.validate:config: node -e "const yaml = require('js-yaml'); const fs = require('fs'); try { yaml.load(fs.readFileSync('agents.yaml', 'utf8')); console.log('✅ agents.yaml is valid'); } catch(e) { console.error('❌ agents.yaml validation failed:', e.message); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.docs:generate: echo 'Documentation generation - implement based on project needs'
scripts.test: echo 'Tests - implement based on project needs'

author: Your Organization
